parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const answers = data.answers_flat || {};
return [{
  ...data,
  case_type: 'CLIENT_ONBOARDING',
  client_name: answers.nombre || 'Sin nombre',
  business: answers.negocio || 'Sin negocio',
  email: answers.email || '',
  phone: answers.telefono || data.phoneNumber || '',
  sector: answers.tipo_negocio || '',
  services_needed: answers.servicios || '',
  urgency: answers.urgencia || '',
  budget: answers.presupuesto || '',
  referrer: answers.referido_por || '',
  preferred_contact: answers.contacto_preferido || '',
  message: answers.mensaje || '',
}];

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{'role':'system','content':'Eres Talia, asistente operativa de soul:23. Procesa el payload y genera JSON con: client_email_html, internal_email_html, crm_summary, priority, tags, follow_up, alerts.'},{'role':'user','content':JSON.stringify($json)}]
